Material - Our birthday candles are made of high quality wax. The candles burn smoothly and steadily, smokeless, non-toxic and harmless.
Wide Usage - These Number Candles can be used for celebrating Birthday, Wedding Anniversary, Reunions, Parties, Business Anniversary, Pets Birthday, etc.

Design Inspiration - The design of Arabic numeral candles is inspired by the appearance of Sydney Opera House. 3D designed numeral candles are full of stereoscopic and advanced sense, make your party unique and impressive.
Packing - These birthday candles are well packed. It is not easy to be damaged during transportation and storage.
